name: Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the diced green chilies and tomato sauce (or mild chili) in a saucepan.
2. Add the chopped green onions, cumin, minced garlic, and 30 ounces of refried beans to the saucepan with the chilies and tomato sauce.
3. Cook over medium heat until the onions are tender.
4. Stir in the refried beans and cook for an additional 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed (add more cumin or garlic).
6. Serve hot or cold. For added flavor, top with freshly grated low-fat cheese if desired.
Yield: This recipe makes approximately 4 cups of bean dip, serving about 16 portions.
One Serving Calories:
76 Protein: 4 g Fat: 1 g Carbohydrate: 12 g Fiber: 6.4 g Cholesterol: 0 mg Sodium: 302 mg Potassium: 262 mg Exchange: 1 Starch/Bread
Good source of dietary fiber
